title: Notice to employers
doc_html:
§1017.6.  Notice to employers

First responders shall give notice to employers of their call to service as soon as practical including day of departure, as well as probable length or duration of service under this Part.

Acts 2004, No. 316, §2, eff. June 18, 2004.
